creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
bsam        2006-09-27 15:18:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/ipmi-kmod   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Added files:
    sysutils/ipmi-kmod/files patch-Makefile 
                             patch-dev-ipmi-ipmi_ssif.c 
  Log:
  - more recent snapshot of the code from -current, containing much new code
    recently committed;
  - the port will no longer build on FreeBSD 6-stable for versions after ipmi
    was MFC'd into the base system.
  
  PR:             103708
  Submitted by:   Nick Barkas <snb at threerings.net> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +4 -6      ports/sysutils/ipmi-kmod/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/sysutils/ipmi-kmod/distinfo
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/sysutils/ipmi-kmod/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/sysutils/ipmi-kmod/files/patch-dev-ipmi-ipmi_ssif.c (new)
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/sysutils/ipmi-kmod/pkg-descr
